title: Dialogue Role-Play
description: The candidate participates in a role-play simulating a common everyday situation in Switzerland. The examiner plays the other person (shopkeeper, doctor, postal worker, etc.).
system_prompt_template: You are a Fide oral exam examiner conducting a role-play. You play the role of {{role}}. The scenario is: {{scenario}}. Stay in character. Speak clearly at A2 level. Guide the conversation naturally but let the candidate drive. If they struggle, offer a simpler rephrasing. The dialogue should last 6-10 exchanges. Evaluate their ability to handle the transactional situation.

scenarios.scenario: The candidate comes to the pharmacy with a headache and a cold. They need to ask for medication, describe symptoms, and understand dosage instructions.
scenarios.opening: Bonjour, bienvenue a la pharmacie. Qu'est-ce que je peux faire pour vous ?

scenarios.role: a postal worker at La Poste
scenarios.scenario: The candidate wants to send a package to another country. They need to choose a shipping method, fill out a customs form, and pay.
scenarios.opening: Bonjour, c'est a vous. Qu'est-ce que vous desirez ?

scenarios.scenario: The candidate has a doctor's appointment because they have had stomach pain for several days. They describe symptoms, answer questions, and understand the doctor's advice.
scenarios.opening: Bonjour, asseyez-vous. Alors, qu'est-ce qui ne va pas ?

scenarios.scenario: The candidate is buying bread and pastries for a family gathering. They need to ask what's available, choose items, ask about ingredients (allergy), and pay.
scenarios.opening: Bonjour ! Qu'est-ce que je vous sers ?

asking_questions: Quel est le plat du jour ?
Qu'est-ce que vous avez comme desserts ?
Qu'est-ce qu'il y a dans ce plat ?
paying: Je pourrais avoir l'addition, s'il vous plait ?
server_phrases: Qu'est-ce que vous prendrez comme boisson ?

scenarios.role: a ticket agent at the CFF/SBB counter
scenarios.scenario: The candidate needs to buy a train ticket from their city to another Swiss city. They need to choose between first/second class, single/return, and ask about times.
The candidate calls to report a problem in their apartment (e.g., broken heating, water leak). They describe the problem, its location, and arrange for a repair visit.
scenarios.opening: Regie immobiliere, bonjour. Comment puis-je vous aider ?

scenarios.scenario: The candidate is a parent meeting their child's teacher. They discuss their child's progress, ask about homework, and discuss a school event.
scenarios.opening: Bonsoir, merci d'etre venu. Asseyez-vous, je vous en prie.

scenarios.scenario: The candidate needs to register a change of address. They provide information and ask about required documents.

requesting_appointment: Bonjour, je voudrais prendre un rendez-vous svp.
Bonjour, j'aimerais faire un rdv avec...
proposing_date: Quand est-ce que vous avez des disponibilites ?
refusing_date: Desolee, ce n'est pas possible pour moi.
Un peu plus tard ou plus tot, c'est possible ?

scoring_criteria.task_completion: Achieves the transactional goal of the scenario
scoring_criteria.interaction: Responds appropriately and asks relevant questions
scoring_criteria.grammar: Uses appropriate verb tenses and structures
scoring_criteria.politeness: Uses polite forms (vous, je voudrais, s'il vous plait)
